assertions.title: A failed item does not block continuing with another ready item

steps.action: Open the seeded session and start preparation for the two selected items.
steps.expected: Preparation starts for both selected items in mixed-outcomes mode.
steps.observed: The seeded session showed the two selected rows and advanced to the preparation page for those items.

steps.action: Wait for mixed outcomes on the preparation page.
steps.expected: The failing item remains failed while the other item reaches ready.
steps.observed: 如何制作完美的咖啡拉花 ☕ stayed failed with reason "Failed to download video: Video is private or unavailable", while 今日穿搭分享 💃 became ready with an Open Studio link.

steps.expected: The failed item exposes an item-scoped retry affordance without blocking the ready item.
steps.observed: A Retry button remained visible for item_098327167a5d0b7d9a7e6e0e and a POST retry request was issued for only that item.

steps.action: Open studio from the ready item.
steps.expected: The ready item opens studio successfully even though the other item is failed.
steps.observed: Open Studio for item_969c1f1c99fda7d848fdc1e3 navigated to /items/item_969c1f1c99fda7d848fdc1e3 and loaded the studio workspace.

evidence.network: GET /api/sessions/session_124c27ed429dda4ca046f060 repeated while polling; POST /api/sessions/session_124c27ed429dda4ca046f060/prepare/item_098327167a5d0b7d9a7e6e0e/retry observed; GET /api/items/item_969c1f1c99fda7d848fdc1e3 observed when opening studio.

frictions.description: The initial wait used a broad URL pattern (**/prepare) while the app navigated to /preparation, so the automatic wait timed out even though the page had already loaded.
frictions.resolution: Verified the actual URL, continued on the loaded preparation page, and captured evidence from there.

summary: Tested 1 assertion: 1 passed. The failed preparation item did not block retry visibility or opening studio for the ready item.
